body: Please include the source of the errors in the error logs.
@davidkna By the source of the errors, do you mean the specific crate which failed to build or the last command which was run?
As far as I can tell your error logs only show transitive errors and do not include the main error message.

I've attached the full error message below. Apologies for the lengthy comment.

Does the current master branch build for you? CMake shouldn't be used anymore.

Current branch builds without issues. Thank you so much!

Hopefully this version can be added to the crate registry soon.
